items.briefing:
Targeted phishing attacks are a growing concern for Australian organisations, with new research highlighting that spear phishing — highly personalised scam emails — is a leading cause of payment fraud losses. AI is making these attacks more convincing and harder to spot, meaning staff should be extra cautious about any unexpected requests involving payments or account changes, even if the email appears to come from a known contact.

On a positive note, Google is rolling out fake call detection on Android phones, which will help Australians identify suspicious calls automatically. If you receive an unexpected email or call requesting urgent financial action, always verify the request through a separate, trusted channel before acting.

featured.title: PhishByte warns spear phishing drives payment fraud losses
featured.quote: Spear phishing directly costs Australian businesses significant payment fraud losses through targeted email attacks.
